name: Blue Cheese BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir in the flour until well blended.
3. Whisk in the milk and continue to stir until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients, mixing well.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature, over grilled meat.
